steps.llm_raw: {"action": "done", "summary": "Subdomain enumeration identified 519 subdomains, including ci.gitlab.com and geo1.gitlab.com. HTTP probing found 1 live host (archives.docs.gitlab.com). final_summary: Subdomain enumeration identified 519 subdomains, including ci.gitlab.com and geo1.gitlab.com. HTTP probing found 1 live host (archives.docs.gitlab.com). Nuclei scan yielded no vulnerabilities. Limited live hosts constrained further analysis.
